serviceNotes.engine oil: S85 V10: short oil intervals; track use ~8,000 km.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: V10 intake; frequent replacement ~30,000 km planning.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Ten plugs; M5 S85 high-performance interval 45,000 km MFR (BMW M maintenance literature).
serviceNotes.SMG gearbox fluid: SMG single-clutch automated manual: hydraulic/fluid service ~60,000 km.
serviceNotes.differential fluids: M rear axle: fluid refresh ~60,000 km.
serviceNotes.valve adjustment: Solid lifter V10; valve clearance per BMW M maintenance schedule (~50,000 km REC in data).

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW M5 (E60/E61) owner's manual / M service literature — 15,000 km / 12 months oil service typical; track use shorter (8,000 km REC).
serviceSources.micro filter: BMW M5 (E60/E61) owner's manual — cabin microfilter per M CBS
serviceSources.brake fluid: BMW M5 (E60/E61) owner's manual — brake fluid 24 months; track more frequent
serviceSources.air cleaner element: BMW M maintenance literature / M5 intake service — air filter ~30,000 km planning (2 × 15,000 km oil interval)
serviceSources.spark plugs: BMW M5 S85 maintenance literature — ten spark plugs 45,000 km service interval
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 / M brake inspection — inspect at least every 15,000 km
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 / M brake inspection — inspect at least every 15,000 km
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW M5 (E60/E61) service display / M inspection — vehicle check 30,000 km planning (2 × 15,000 km oil)
